text.title: Stakeholder Engagement Advanced Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping plan state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there at least one stakeholder where current_engagement != desired_engagement?

conclusion.verdict: no advanced plan needed; base engagement methodology suffices
write strategy section per delta entry

branch.when: any_delta == true AND missing_strategy == false AND insufficient_indicators == true
any_delta == true AND missing_strategy == false AND insufficient_indicators == false AND diff_run == false
any_delta == true AND missing_strategy == false AND insufficient_indicators == false AND diff_run == true AND regression_present == true

conclusion.verdict: escalate regression to sponsor in next status

branch.when: any_delta == true AND missing_strategy == false AND insufficient_indicators == false AND diff_run == true AND regression_present == false

conclusion.verdict: accept plan; track deltas next cycle
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: any_delta=true, missing_strategy=false, insufficient_indicators=false, diff_run=true, regression_present=false → accept plan.
